input.content: Search X for substantive, recent posts about: AI agents that transact onchain - agent payments, AI-judged bounties, decentralized AI oracles. Date range: 2026-07-15 to 2026-07-16. Return up to 10 high-signal posts, prioritizing verifiable claims, launches, funding, releases, exploits, or hard data over hot takes. For EACH post return handle, full text, date posted, exact engagement counts, and the direct link. Return a numbered list.
